title: Junior Frontend Developer at Ola Cabs Global Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Ola Cabs Global Group
jsonLd.description:
We at Ola Cabs Global Group are looking for an experienced Frontend Developer based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Ola Cabs Global Group:
Ola Cabs Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ola Cabs Global Group!
